title: magnolia stellata f. rosea
intro: Magnolia stellata f. rosea is a cultivar of the star magnolia, a deciduous flowering plant known for its showy, pink or rose-colored flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Magnolia stellata f. rosea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or tea, and is also used in herbal formulations to support lung health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
